creator: gj@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

(I not the maintainer, but I usually do the commits for him, so I consider 
myself to be co-Maintainer) 
The problem repoerted is due to malformed PATH, not a bug in the 
xemacs20 port. Obviously, /usr/bin should be before /usr/local/bin 
in PATH. 
The xemacs20 port is PREFIX-clean. I installed it using PREFIX=/u6/tmp 
and it didn't touch anything but /u6/tmp. 
Not sure about Xemac's send-pr not working. Maybe a separate PR should 
be submitted for that.
